title: Zaluzianskia deflexa
intro: Zaluzianskia deflexa, also known as the desert-holly or prickly saltbush, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the family Amaranthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing symptoms of arthritis and improving overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Zaluzianskia deflexa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its potential therapeutic properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Zaluzianskia deflexa is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.

The plant is classified in the genus Zaluzianskia, which is a group of flowering plants.
